news.t: Weitz Investment Management Launches Multisector Bond ETF

overview.description: The Weitz Multisector Bond ETF (WMSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed multisector bond ETF investing across corporate debt, structured credit, loans, and government securities with flexibility across credit quality and maturity. It seeks high current income with a secondary goal of capital appreciation  WMSB was launched on Nov 4, 2025 and is issued by Weitz.

data.title: Weitz Investment Management Launches Multisector Bond ETF
data.text: OMAHA, Neb.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Weitz Investment Management, Inc. (“Weitz”) today announced the launch of the Weitz Multisector Bond ETF (NYSE: WMSB), an actively managed fixed-income strategy designed ...
